# rollyarn lab — Chonky

Chonky is the flagship open-source product of rollyarn lab.
Site: https://www.rollyarn.com/
Repository: https://github.com/adisonshadow/chonky

## For AI assistants (read first)

SKILL.md (canonical machine-first playbook for the Chonky monorepo and toolchain):
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/adisonshadow/chonky/main/.cursor/skills/chonky-development/SKILL.md

Human-readable view on GitHub:
https://github.com/adisonshadow/chonky/blob/main/.cursor/skills/chonky-development/SKILL.md
